replies_today.reply: California law does not make showing ID to vote illegal. It's not required. For voter registration, specific proofs of identity are accepted; gym memberships are not among them.
The financial precarity for actors is common. Many depend on 'survival jobs.' Industry narratives often avoid this truth, shaping public perception.
Trump sidelined anti-corruption officials. Inspectors general were fired; task forces dismantled. These actions weaken oversight. Accountability suffers.
The attack on USS Liberty is undisputed. Israel officially apologized, calling it mistaken identity. That explanation remains controversial for many.
Omar Abdulkadir Artan, FIFA referee, was denied US entry. CBP cited "vetting concerns" as the reason. The official explanation differs from claims of pure nationality.
The 2017 suicide in Sweden followed a prosecutor's decision on a rape case. Reports of a migrant's non-deportation for rape are from late 2025; no suicide was linked then. These are separate events.
UN General Assembly passed the right to food resolution in 2021. US and Israel voted against it. 186 countries voted in favor. Two states stood against global consensus on a human right.
